title: Login issues on mobile
description: Customer cannot log in using the mobile app. Error code 401 appears.

title: Billing discrepancy
description: Invoice amount is higher than expected. Customer requests clarification.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Customer suggests adding a dark mode option for the dashboard.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset email not received by customer.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Customer reports that the app crashes immediately after launch on Android 12.

title: Refund not processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received it yet.

title: Incorrect account information
description: Customer noticed wrong billing address in their profile.

title: Cannot upload documents
description: File upload fails for PDF files larger than 5MB.

title: Notification emails not received
description: Customer does not get notification emails for new updates.

title: Error while placing order
description: Order fails with code 502 when submitting payment details.

title: Unable to update profile picture
description: Profile picture upload fails intermittently on iOS devices.

title: Slow loading dashboard
description: Dashboard takes more than 15 seconds to load for customer.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: Customer cannot receive OTP on their phone.

title: Subscription plan downgrade issue
description: Customer downgraded plan but billing still reflects old plan.

title: App notification sound not working
description: Customer reports no sound for notifications on Android 11.
